creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
In order to use plugins distibuted as binaries, e.g. macromedia flash
or realaudio, you need to use the linux version of Netscape. Here's a
port that installs linux-netscape.

It uses the same common Makefile as the freebsd ports
(/usr/ports/netscape4-communicator/Makefile) but one minor
modification is needed, at least if we don't want linux and freebsd
binaries to get mixed in the same dir. Diff below.
